title: Exploit for Path Traversal in Tp-Link Tapo_C260_Firmware

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Exploit for Path Traversal in Tp-Link Tapo_C260_Firmware
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/07
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*lfd.py*'
            - '*requirements.txt*'
            - '*tapo-c260-rce.git*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
